race.comment: The feature race on the card, the $150,000 Rockhampton Cup. PEPPERDINE (11) loves it here on his home circuit with eight wins and two placings from just 11 spins and is yet to miss a drum in four attempts over this track and trip. Winning rider sticks in the saddle and should get a gun run from gate four. Goes on top. The well-related GIVE ME SPACE (3) (half to G3 winner Extra Time) is a former Victorian who hit the frame here in his first run for the new stable and will find this easier than what he faced down south. Looms as the main danger. QUOTHQUAN (2) returned in good order with a solid Ipswich win and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Top-three contender. KEITEL (1) will be ready to peak now third run back and must be respected out of the Vandyke barn. In the mix on best form. ZOOLOGY (4) best of the rest.
